data.title: Encoded Therapeutics reports positive interim data for ETX101 gene therapy in Dravet syndrome at AES2025, featured in oral presentation and poster session.
data.description: In South San Francisco, California, a biotechnology company named Encoded Therapeutics Inc. shared optimistic interim findings from its POLARIS clinical trial on ETX101 for children suffering from SCN1A+ Dravet syndrome. These results were presented at the American Epilepsy Society (AES) Annual Meeting through an oral presentation today, with a follow-up poster session scheduled for tomorrow. The company is focused on developing genetic therapies for severe neurological conditions, with this particular program showing promise in addressing the disorder.

data.title: Cardano and Solana drop 7% and 5% respectively, XRP down 2%, approaching critical technical levels. Solana faces resistance around $141-$153.
data.description: XRP experienced a 2% decline on Friday as both Cardano (ADA) and Solana (SOL) saw continued drops in their prices. Solana saw a 5% decrease and is currently struggling to break above a downtrend line that has consistently blocked recovery attempts. The price of SOL sits below the trendline and the 20-day EMA around $140, indicating strong resistance in this area. Additionally, a cluster of Fibonacci resistance levels ranging from $141 to $153 has been preventing any significant upside movements. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) hovers around 41, indicating a slowdown in momentum without exhaustion signals, suggesting a gradual decline could persist. If selling pressure continues, the price might revisit the $122–$121 support range. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: US Soccer launches 2026 World Cup campaign celebrating USMNT's resilience, narrated by Marcello Hernandez. Film honors iconic moments.
data.description: U.S. Soccer presented a new 90-second anthem film celebrating belief, defiance, and memorable U.S. Men's National Team moments before the upcoming global sporting event. Titled Never Chase Reality™, the film pays tribute to iconic instances in the team's history. The unveiling took place in Atlanta on December 5, 2025, marking the official kickoff for the team's journey to the 2026 World Cup.

data.title: Donaldson Company, Inc. reported Q1 fiscal 2026 sales of $935.4 million, 3.9% Y/Y increase. Net earnings rose to $113.9 million. Adjusted EPS beat consensus at 94 cents. Fiscal 2026 guidance for adjusted EPS raised to $3.95-$4.11.
data.description: Donaldson Company, Inc. (NYSE: DCI) released strong financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, with sales increasing by 3.9% year over year to $935.4 million, surpassing the expected $922.9 million. The growth was driven by favorable currency translation and volume expansion. GAAP net earnings also saw a rise to $113.9 million (equivalent to 97 cents per share) from $99.0 million (or 81 cents per share) in the previous year. Adjusted EPS stood at 94 cents, outperforming the anticipated 92 cents. The company adjusted its fiscal 2026 guidance for adjusted EPS to a range of $3.95-$4.11, up from the previous range of $3.92-$4.08, compared to the consensus of $4.01. Donaldson Company, Inc. also revised its sales growth projection upwards. The detailed report can be found at Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sobi (STO: SOBI) to present scientific advances at ASH 2025 Annual Meeting in Orlando, Florida, from Dec. 6-9.
data.description: Sobi® (STO: SOBI) revealed its involvement in the upcoming 65th American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting, which is set to occur from December 6th to 9th in Orlando, Florida in a recent announcement on December 5, 2025. The company will be highlighting its dedication to improving healthcare at the event.

data.title: FIA's UAOA Campaign funds 5th scholar for research program, fighting online abuse.
data.description: In London, the United Against Online Abuse (UAOA) Campaign by the FIA has announced the addition of the 5th scholar to its primary scholarship program.

data.title: Polymarket to utilize in-house market maker for trading against users amid US expansion, as rival Kalshi faces scrutiny. #news #finance
data.description: A company has reached out to traders, including individuals who engage in sports betting, to recruit them for its expansion in the US. This move comes as a rival company, Kalshi, is being investigated for comparable activities.

data.title: SciBase releases document for repurchasing all series TO 2 warrants; offer announced on 7 November.
data.description: Stockholm, December 5, 2025 - SciBase Holding AB (publ) released an informational document regarding the repurchase offer for all current warrants of series TO 2 in SciBase. The TO 2 Offer was first introduced by SciBase on November 7. The company is encouraging shareholders to take advantage of this opportunity to sell their warrants back to SciBase. This move is in line with the company's strategic plans and aims to streamline operations. SciBase has not disclosed the exact number of warrants being repurchased, but this initiative is an important step in the company's growth strategy.

data.title: Hydron Energy named in Foresight Canada's Top 50 Investable Clean Tech Companies for 2025. Major recognition for the company.
data.description: In North Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 5, 2025, Hydron Energy, a prominent company specializing in renewable gas upgrading and clean fuel solutions, was named one of the Top 50 Investable Clean Tech Companies by Foresight Canada for 2025. This acknowledgment showcases the company's position among the top players in the industry and marks a significant achievement for Hydron.

data.title: SentinelOne's Q3 saw solid results but Q4 outlook is softer due to seasonality. ARR at $1.055 billion, 23% growth YoY. Buy rating maintained.
data.description: SentinelOne Inc's (NYSE: S) fiscal third-quarter results were praised for "solid execution," but the fourth-quarter outlook is affected by significant seasonality, uncertain macro conditions, and deal timing. Needham's analyst Mike Cikos maintained a Buy rating but reduced the price target from $23 to $21. The company's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) stood at $1.055 billion, surpassing the expected $1.051 billion, and marked a 23% year-on-year growth compared to the previous quarter's 22%. For more details, a detailed report is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Oil prices rise; Domo shares fall. U.S. stocks up, Nasdaq gains 0.2%. Dow at 47,933.71, Nasdaq at 23,543.03, S&P 500 at 6,867.40. Communication services up 0.9%.Utilities down 0.6%. U.S. PCE price index rose 0.3% in September. Praxis Precision Medicines Inc soared 31%.
data.description: Midway through trading, U.S. stocks saw an increase, notably with the Nasdaq Composite rising by approximately 0.2% on Friday. The Dow climbed by 0.17% to reach 47,933.71, while the NASDAQ saw a 0.16% increase to hit 23,543.03. The S&P 500 also experienced a rise, gaining 0.15% to reach 6,867.40. Communication services shares notably surged by 0.9%, while utilities stocks fell by 0.6%. In economic news, the U.S. PCE price index saw a 0.3% month-over-month increase in September, aligning with market expectations. In company developments, Praxis Precision Medicines Inc (NASDAQ: PRAX) saw a significant spike in shares by 31% to $248.00 following the announcement of successful completion of its pre-NDA meeting with the FDA and obtaining alignment from the agency. The company also disclosed results from the EMBOLD study.
